creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
Trying to install www/onlyoffice-documentserver in 13.0 jail, I got the following error:

[onlyof1.lexcase.local] [32/32] Extracting onlyoffice-documentserver-7.0.1.50_2: 100%
Running documentserver-generate-allfonts.sh to generate OnlyOffice fonts and themes...
pkg: Failed to execute lua trigger: [string "print("Running documentserver-generate-allfon..."]:2: bad argument #1 to 'exec' (table expected, got string)
pkg: lua script failed
